channel.title: Blackpoint Cyber Threat Intelligence & Research (Custom Feed)

item.title: Akira Ransomware
item.description: Akira has been active since 2023; operates in the double extortion method, where victim data is stolen and leaked if the ransom is not paid.

item.title: Ransomhub Ransomware
item.description: Download Ransomhub ransomware's threat profile for exploited vulnerabilities, industry and geographic targets, criminal associates, and more.

item.title: Clop Ransomware
item.description: Comprehensive profile of Clop ransomware: learn its attack methods, campaigns, and impact. Stay informed with threat insights, IOCs, and more.

item.title: SafePay Ransomware
item.description: SafePay has been active since 2024; operates in the double extortion method, where victim data is stolen and leaked if the ransom is not paid.

item.title: DragonForce Ransomware
item.description: Download DragonForce's threat profile for exploited vulnerabilities, industry and geographic targets, criminal associates, and more.

item.title: Lynx Ransomware
item.description: Lynx Ransomware was first identified in July 2024 when the group began posting purported victims on their data leak site, Lynx News.

item.title: Play Ransomware
item.description: Detailed profile of the Play ransomware operation, including techniques, infrastructure, and indicators of compromise.

item.title: Sinobi Ransomware
item.description: Download Sinobi Ransomware's threat profile for exploited vulnerabilities, industry and geographic targets, criminal associates, and more.

item.title: SocGholish Loader Malware
item.description: Download the full SocGholish threat profile, with exploited vulnerabilities, previous campaigns, MITRE ATT&CK mappings, and more.

item.title: Vidar Stealer
item.description: Download the full Vidar Stealer malware threat profile, with exploited vulnerabilities, known targets, MITRE ATT&CK mappings, and more.

item.title: FIN7 Threat Group
item.description: Download the full FIN7 threat profile from the APG, featuring exploited vulnerabilities, known targets, MITRE ATT&CK mappings, and more.

item.title: BianLian Ransomware
item.description: BianLian ransomware is written in Go language and is compiled as a 64-bit Windows system that has been active since, at least, July 2022.

item.title: Abyss Ransomware
item.description: Abyss Ransomware

item.title: Alphv Ransomware
item.description: Alphv ransomware has been active since November 2021 & operates using the double extortion method – where victim data is stolen & leaked if a ransom is not paid.

item.title: Hunters International Ransomware
item.description: Hunters International ransomware operates in the double extortion method, where victim data is stolen and leaked if the ransom demand is not paid.

item.title: The Gentlemen Ransomware
item.description: Download a detailed analysis of The Gentlemen ransomware — attack methods, tools, and threat intelligence insights.

item.title: Sarcoma Ransomware
item.description: Sarcoma is known for fast-moving intrusions, data theft, and double-extortion. Learn how the malware operates, their targets, and more.

item.title: BlackSuit Ransomware
item.description: BlackSuit is a double-extortion threat targeting enterprises with data theft and large-scale encryption across Windows and ESXi environments. Learn how it operates, who it targets, and more.

item.title: INC Ransom Ransomware
item.description: INC Ransom is a financially driven group using double-extortion tactics. This profile highlights their behavior and indicators for defense.

item.title: Medusa Ransomware
item.description: Medusa is a financially driven group using double-extortion tactics. This profile highlights their behavior and indicators for defense.

item.title: ThreeAM Ransomware
item.description: ThreeAM is a financially driven group using double-extortion tactics. This profile highlights their behavior and indicators for defense.

item.title: World Leaks Ransomware
item.description: World Leaks is a financially driven group using data-extortion tactics. This profile highlights their behavior and indicators for defense.

item.title: Qilin Ransomware
item.description: Download the full Qilin ransomware threat profile, with exploited vulnerabilities, known targets, MITRE ATT&CK mappings, and more.

item.title: https://blackpointcyber.com/threat-intelligence-and-research/ — sitemap had no items
item.description: No items were discoverable via sitemap(s) or they pointed to non-article URLs.
